_comment: Copilot agent configuration defaults for this repository.

permissions._comment_defaultMode: Options: dontAsk | ask | denyAll. ask is a safer default for shared repos.

_comment_model: Replace with any Copilot-supported model alias your account can use.

hooks._comment: Hook script paths are relative to this repo root. See config/hooks.md.

mcp._comment: Add MCP server definitions here when needed.
